# Heterogeneity and Individual Causal Effects

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Subgroup analysis

_To be added._

## Risk modeling

_To be added._

## Treatment effect (uplift) modeling

_To be added._

## Regression-based uplift modeling

_To be added._

## Tree-based uplift modeling

_To be added._

## Validation of uplift models

_To be added._
